title: Mace to Scythe by Krishnq
description: This convert the normal mace into 3D ENDER SCYTHE
body:
Converts mace into scythe [3D] 
Looks good which works without CIT OR OPTIFINE
Made by Dolph1n_
Works on 1.21.x (it shows wrong version but it works just put and launch the game) 

ENJOY USING THIS PACK.
